title: 《灵枢》《难经》公共转录本校勘见证

retrieval.method: HTTP GET with redirects and a browser-compatible user agent
retrieval.hashMeaning: SHA256 and bytes identify the exact HTML response retrieved for this audit; dynamic pages may produce a different response hash on a later retrieval.
retrieval.archivalBoundary: Only transformed metadata and short public-domain passage witnesses are stored here; fetched HTML is not copied into the repository.

witnesses.supports: The lung channel heading reads 肺手太阴之脉, not the local witness transcription 肺手太阳之脉.
witnesses.limitations: Open digital transcription; useful for cross-witness collation but not a substitute for an identified print edition or image facsimile.

witnesses.supports: Independently agrees with the CText reading 肺手太阴之脉.
witnesses.limitations: Community-maintained digital transcription; not an edition-level facsimile witness.

witnesses.supports: The passage reads 入国问俗 and 临病人问所便, where the local witness has 间 for both 问 characters.
witnesses.excerpt: 入国问俗，入家问讳，上堂问礼，临病人问所便
witnesses.limitations: Open digital transcription; used only to flag a local transcription error and not to promote the surrounding medical interpretation.

witnesses.supports: Registers a public transcription route for the work; this retrieved page is not used as evidence for the 十八难 wording correction.

witnesses.supports: The passage reads 九候者，浮中沉, supporting 候 over the local witness transcription 侯.
witnesses.excerpt: 三部者，寸关尺也；九候者，浮中沉也
witnesses.limitations: Community-maintained digital transcription; used for character-level collation, not semantic or clinical acceptance.
